news.t: ETF Prime: ETF Inflows on Pace to Shatter Annual Record
From Allbirds to AI, the meme-stock frenzy is warning you to own this quality ‘antimeme' portfolio instead
Tuttle Capital Management Launches the Tuttle Capital Meme Stock Income Blast ETF (MEMY)
Beyond Meat, Walmart and a MEME ETF
One-time penny stock Beyond Meat soars after addition to meme ETF, jumps 47% on Tuesday
Meme-stock ETF is back from the dead. Last time, its launch coincided with the 2021 market top.
The Meme ETF is back. Is it late to the party again?
Roundhill Brings Back a Meme Stock ETF. Opendoor, Rigetti, Bloom Energy Make the Cut.

holdings.infoBox: MEME is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Applied Optoelectronics stock at 6.93%, Nebius Group at 6.53%, Bloom Energy at 6.14%, Redwire at 5.87%, and AST SpaceMobile at 5.81%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Meme Stock ETF (MEME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio of highly speculative US equities considered as meme stocks. These stocks experience an increased short-term trading activity due to heightened online engagement across widely used platforms and forums. MEME was launched on Oct 8, 2025 and is issued by Roundhill.
